EASTER_EGGS.JPN: Japanese kids learn to clean their own schools. No janitors!
EASTER_EGGS.MNG: Mongolian kids learn to ride horses before they learn to walk. FOR REAL.
EASTER_EGGS.AUS: Wombat poop is CUBE-SHAPED. Scientists still can't figure out why.
EASTER_EGGS.ISL: There are NO mosquitoes in Iceland. Not a single one.
EASTER_EGGS.BRA: Brazil has a river that flows UNDERWATER beneath the Amazon.
EASTER_EGGS.EGY: Ancient Egyptians used moldy bread as medicine. Penicillin before penicillin!
EASTER_EGGS.IND: India has a temple covered in 20,000 kilograms of real GOLD.
EASTER_EGGS.MEX: Mexico City is sinking 10 inches per year because it was built on a lake.
EASTER_EGGS.KEN: Kenyans hold 90% of marathon world records. Their secret? Running to school as kids.
EASTER_EGGS.FIN: Finns have a word for drinking alone in your underwear: kalsarikännit.
EASTER_EGGS.GRC: Greece has more archaeological museums than any country. They keep FINDING stuff.
EASTER_EGGS.NOR: Norway once knighted a PENGUIN. Sir Nils Olav III.
EASTER_EGGS.KOR: South Korea has an entire theme park dedicated to TOILETS.
EASTER_EGGS.CHL: Chile is so long and narrow that it has deserts, glaciers, AND tropical islands.
EASTER_EGGS.NPL: Nepal's flag is the only national flag that isn't a rectangle. It's two triangles!

SURPRISE_ACHS.title: Neighborhood Watch!
SURPRISE_ACHS.sub: 3 countries on the same continent in a row
